text: Ray of Light - attacks with a beam attack.
Ball of Light - blinds an entity when it hits it.
Blinding Flash - blinds everyone within a 3 block radius.
Abode of Light: +20% damage; 10% chance to gain "Dash II" for 7 sec on attack (once per 25 sec).
Light Shield: 5% chance to activate "Regeneration II" for 10 sec when hit.
